methodology.test: Mann-Whitney U (two-sided, tie-corrected, normal approximation with continuity correction)
methodology.rationale: Impression counts are heavily right-skewed; rank-based tests are robust to that shape. Cliff's delta floor of 0.20 excludes tiny-but-significant differences that aren't practically actionable.

top.text:
Rea vs. Skenes. PNC Park. First pitch 5:40 PM CT.

The Cubs ended a 10-GAME SKID last night with a 10-4 rout. Tonight they can earn a series split against Paul Skenes and a Pirates team that's been gritty all month.

The momentum is there.

Iowa dropped their eighth straight game Wednesday, 6-3 to Memphis. Connor Noland was carted off after a comebacker hit his ankle — status unknown.

Kane Kepley homered in the seventh for the lone bright spot in a rough stretch.

#Cubs #MLB

Tonight at Coors Field: Colin Rea (5-3, 4.59 ERA) vs Tomoyuki Sugano (5-4, 3.98 ERA).

Sugano is the Rockies' best arm — but this is the same staff with the WORST ERA in baseball. Attack the bullpen early and often.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

The Cubs face Paul Skenes on Thursday. Let that sink in.

Skenes: 6-4, 3.00 ERA, 65 strikeouts. Chicago scored just 1 run in Game 1 and has averaged under 3 runs per game during this 9-game skid. This isn't a scheduling quirk — it's a night

Christian Walker went yard twice (13 HRs), Kai-Wei Teng held Chicago to 2 hits in 6 innings, and the Cubs dropped their SEVENTH straight for the first time since 2022.

In those 17 days: rotation ERA above 6.00, offense 28th in OPS, pitching 28th in ERA, 12 losses in 14 games. They've gone from the NL's hottest team to clinging to a wild card spot.

Horton out until 2027. Steele hit a setback. Taillon leads the majors in HRs allowed. The Cubs' rotation is in crisis mode, and Wicks has earned his shot.

Harrison hasn't allowed more than 2 runs in any of his 8 starts this year. Cabrera has given up a HR in five straight.

top_performers.text:
The Cubs face Paul Skenes on Thursday. Let that sink in.

Skenes: 6-4, 3.00 ERA, 65 strikeouts. Chicago scored just 1 run in Game 1 and has averaged under 3 runs per game during this 9-game skid. This isn't a scheduling quirk — it's a nightmare matchup.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

Cubs open a 4-game road series in Pittsburgh today.

Ben Brown (2.09 ERA, 40 K in 38.2 IP) faces Carmen Mlodzinski (4-3, 3.96 ERA) at PNC Park — first pitch 12:35 PM CT. Pirates are 27-26. Cubs have lost 8 straight. ⚾

Snap the skid or fall to nine.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

On May 8 the Cubs were 15 games over .500.

In those 17 days: rotation ERA above 6.00, offense 28th in OPS, pitching 28th in ERA, 12 losses in 14 games. They've gone from the NL's hottest team to clinging to a wild card spot.

This isn't a slump.

#Cubs #MLB #NorthSiders

Astros 3, Cubs 0.

Christian Walker went yard twice (13 HRs), Kai-Wei Teng held Chicago to 2 hits in 6 innings, and the Cubs dropped their SEVENTH straight for the first time since 2022.

The offense has completely vanished. Something has to give.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Jordan Wicks makes his first MLB start of 2026 tonight — at PNC Park, where he made his debut in Aug 2023 (9 K, 10-6 win).

Wicks: 0.60 ERA in his last 3 Iowa starts. He faces Braxton Ashcraft (2.89 ERA). First pitch 5:40 PM CT.

New arm. Same place.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

bottom_performers.text:
Good news amid the rotation gloom: Matt Boyd throws off the mound this Saturday.

He's ahead of schedule from meniscus surgery — pain-free, progressing well. Late June return is on the table.

The cavalry is coming. Just not yet.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

The Cubs went 2-11 in 13 games. The Brewers went 8-2.

Milwaukee is 30-19 and leads the NL Central. Chicago's 2.5-game division lead from May 16 is gone. Today's Imanaga start is the most important in weeks.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Milwaukee just swept the Cardinals and is 14-4 in their last 18.

The Brewers are 4 games up on the Cubs in the NL Central — and they're RUNNING. One win after a 10-game skid isn't enough. The Cubs need a sustained run, and they need it now.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Two 10-game win streaks. One 10-game skid. All in the same season.

The 2026 Cubs just joined the 2017 Dodgers as the ONLY teams in MLB history to pull that off.

That's this team. Maddening, electric, and completely unlike anything else.

#Cubs #ChicagoCubs #MLB

Cubs 7, Pirates 2. Happ 2-run HR, Suzuki 2 hits and 2 RBI. The Cubs handed Skenes his 3rd straight loss and split the Pittsburgh series.

Skenes fanned 10 in 5.1 IP but 2 Pittsburgh errors in the 6th gifted a 3-0 lead. Cubs leave Pittsburgh at 31-26. 🔥

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs
